     The Numbers Business Report

Christmas with the Chosen: The Messengers (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $13,388,000Details
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Chosen has a new episode! To launch the Christmas season this December, The Chosen has created a special episode about the birth of Christ through the eyes of Mary and Joseph. You’ll also see an extraordinary lineup of musicians perform both new and classic Christmas songs from the set of The Chosen, including: Phil Wickham, For King & Country, Brandon Lake, Maverick City Music, Cain, Matt Maher, Bryan & Katie Torwalt, Jordan Feliz, We The Kingdom, The Bonner Family, Leanna Crawford, Dawson Hollow, and One Voice Choir.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,245,000 (31.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.15 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:100.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:1,700 opening theaters/1,700 max. theaters, 1.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $15,744,395

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 1st, 2021 (Limited) by Fathom Events
December 12th, 2023 (Special Engagement) by Fathom Events
Running Time: 124 minutes
Franchise: The Chosen
Subgenre: Music Concert
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Concert/Performance
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
